personal.name: Subham Agarwal
personal.title: Full Stack Developer, curious about building things at scale
about: Currently in my final year of Computer Science at Vellore Institute of Technology, I enjoy understanding how systems actually works- from backend logic to frontend interactions.
My prior internship experiences gave me oppertunity to work on real-world projects and collaborate with cross-functional teams, which helped me grow as a developer.

Right now I’m working on FinTellect, a project that lets users search a stock ticker and understand what’s happening with the company through clear natural-language insights instead of raw financial data.

projects.title: TaskQuest
projects.description: Admins create tasks on the web dashboard, and the team members can interact and update progress on assigned tasks through an intelligent Telegram bot interface.

projects.title: FinTellect
projects.description: Users can search for a stock ticker and get clear, natural-language insights about the company's financials alongside correlating performance with news and macroeconomic trends, all powered by AI.

projects.title: FitFusion
projects.description: A comprehensive gym management app that allows users to look into gyms and give reviews, where gym owners can register their gyms.

experience.description: Contributed to full-stack development projects with focus on modern web technologies and user experience optimization.
achievements: Developed responsive web applications using React and TypeScript
Implemented RESTful APIs and database integration solutions
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an agile environment
Optimized application performance resulting in 30% faster load times
Participated in code reviews and maintained high code quality standards

experience.description: Worked on a government-sponsored project to develop innovative software solutions addressing real-world problems.
achievements: Designed and implemented a scalable software solution for the given problem statement
Collaborated with a team of developers, designers, and domain experts
Presented the project to a panel of judges and received positive feedback for innovation and impact

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
achievements: Member and board member of IEEE-VIT under technical leadership
